description: Memory entries that are deliberately DISTINCT — they share surface keywords or topic overlap but encode different facts/decisions. A correct judge scores every listed pair as NOT duplicates (areDuplicates=false). These are the false-positive trap set for the judge.

pairs.rationale: Both mention 'LRU cache' but one is about read_file (512-cap) and the other is about web-controller request dedup. Distinct features.

a.content: Capped the read_file fileCache at 512 entries with LRU promotion to bound memory.

b.content: The web-controller dedupes concurrent identical requests via an LRU request cache keyed by URL.

pairs.rationale: Both mention qwen2.5:7b-instruct but one is the swap decision and the other is a prompt-template detail. Distinct.

a.content: Swapped the default LLM to qwen2.5:7b-instruct to fix structured-call degradation.

b.content: The salience-judge prompt template asks for a JSON object {"importance": number} in [0,1].

pairs.rationale: Both mention 'checkpoint' but one is async restore and the other is auto-checkpoint on snapshot. Distinct.

a.content: Made restoreCheckpoint async so the PG store can run a real SELECT for existing memory ids.

b.content: AutoCheckpointer triggers createCheckpoint after every N observations during indexing.

pairs.rationale: Both mention 'integration tests' but one is Phase-4 graph and the other is PG-integration suites. Distinct.

a.content: Removed Dx:SKIP guards so the Phase-4 graph integration tests run un-skipped.

b.content: Aligned the PostgresVectorStore gate to DB_AVAILABLE so the PG-integration suites run when DATABASE_URL is postgres.

pairs.rationale: Near-identical sentence structure but completely different domain (config drift vs dep skew). A good judge reads semantics, not syntax.

a.content: The declared config interface drifted from the runtime ServerConfig shape; reconciled the keys.

b.content: The declared dependency versions drifted across workspace packages; aligned @types/node to ^25.

pairs.rationale: Opposite directions on the same component — one adds a guard, the other removes one. Distinct (contradictory, not duplicates).

a.content: Added an LRU eviction guard to the read_file cache to bound memory growth.

b.content: Removed the redundant ENV_BROKEN skip guard from the Phase-4 tests after the pool-kill fix.
